programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania VI
programme.desc: Ben Rothwell vs. Andrei Arlovski, heavyweight title bout; Lorenzo Hunt vs. Yoel Romero, heavyweight.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Mixed martial arts league where athletes compete in a regular season, postseason and championship.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Timur Khizriev vs. Brendan Loughnane.

programme.desc: Ntando Zondi vs. Nathanial Komana. From WSB EFC Arena in Sandton, South Africa.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.desc: From Gold Coast Sports & Leisure Center in Gold Coast, Australia.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: From Feb. 5, 2021 From RP Funding Center in Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 2
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Martin Brown for BKFC lightweight title, Chad Mendes vs. Joshuah Alvarez. Plus Mike Perry vs. Julian Lane in bare knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla. From Feb. 19, 2022.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: BKFC 58 features a stacked card from Sofia, Bulgaria.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with teams of male and female fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Main event: Jason Jackson defeats Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Main event: Marcirley Alves defeats Leandro Higo.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Barrie Jones vs. Tommy Turner; Will Chope vs. Tom Stokes; Ben Robinson vs. Szymon Szynkiewicz. From June 25, 2023 at The O2 Arena in London.

programme.title: BYB 24: Super Brawl Saturday
programme.desc: Heavyweight champion DJ "Da Protégé" Linderman defends his title against undefeated challenger "Hurricane" Ike Villanueva; Harold "Lightning" McQueen takes on Brandon "Slaughterhouse" Birr in a featherweight championship rematch; from Biloxi, Miss.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Cub Hawkins and Ryan Jett fight for the Light Heavy Weight Belt; Agnesa Kirakosian battles Shelby Cannon.

programme.title: BYB 26: Mile High Brawl
programme.desc: Professional bare-knuckle boxing from Denver, featuring Lorawnt-t Nelson vs. Tommy Turner.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: From May 21, 2023, at Indigo at The O2 Arena in London, England.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Patricio Pitbull meets undefeated phenom AJ "Mercenary" McKee in the main event. From July 31, 2021.

programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Mike Richman, light heavyweight championship bout. From Feb. 17, 2023 at Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania IV
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Thiago Alves, light heavyweight; Mick Terrill vs. Lorenzo Hunt, heavyweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Peacock Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: BKFC 27
programme.desc: From Aug. 20, 2022. Features Mike Perry vs. Michael Page, plus Connor Tierney vs. Joe Elmore in bare knuckle boxing action from London.

programme.title: BKFC 28: Ferea vs. Starling
programme.desc: Features Christine Ferea vs. Taylor Starling for BKFC women's flyweight title, plus John Dodson vs. Ryan Benoit in bare knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico. From Aug. 27, 2022.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cheick Kongo takes on Sergei Kharitonov in the main event from Sioux Falls, S.D., Aug. 8, 2021.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Former light heavyweight champion, Phil Davis (21-5) takes on Yoel Romero (13-5) who makes his Bellator debut. From Sept. 18, 2021 at the SAP Center in San Jose, Calif.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a rematch between former world champion No. 1 ranked Douglas Lima and Michael Page. Also featured: top featherweights Leah McCourt and Jessica Borga.

programme.desc: From May 21, 2023, at Indigo at The O2 Arena in London, England.

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete
programme.sub-title: Big Mountain Descent and Biking Begins

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete

programme.desc: The athletes continue with the downhill bike race high and navigate a free ski contest back on Red Mountain 3.

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete
